svg.title: MarketBase highly-available three-tier architecture
svg.desc: A VPC spanning two availability zones: an internet-facing Application Load Balancer in public subnets distributes traffic to an Auto Scaling Group of EC2 instances in private subnets, which connect to a Multi-AZ RDS database in private subnets, with Secrets Manager for credentials and CloudWatch for monitoring.

g.text: Survives an instance OR a full AZ failure · scales on demand · DB unreachable from internet
